testsuite.name: com.stockflip.repository.StockRepositoryTest

testcase.name: search returns fresh results after cache expiry

failure.message: java.lang.RuntimeException: Method e in android.util.Log not mocked. See https://developer.android.com/r/studio-ui/build/not-mocked for details.

testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: Method e in android.util.Log not mocked.
